differentiation.problem: recreate is corpus-bound -> reverts to governance/verification character (ConcordGate proved it)
differentiation.augmentation: domain-distance gate: winner must flip the corpus centroid on >=3 of 5 character axes
differentiation.axes_flipped: 5/5 (purpose generate!=verify, output artifacts!=verdict, interaction generate!=judge, user creator!=agent-ops, domain science+art!=governance)

Implement.engine: deterministic multi-objective (Pareto) evolutionary search, stdlib-only (SHA-256 seed, no random/clock)

Verify.artifacts: examples/{mandala.svg, melody.wav, story.txt} rendered by the engine itself

deliverable: Confluence/ — one domain-agnostic generative design engine + 8 domain packs spanning pharma/materials/semiconductor/energy/data + art/music/story; single stdlib module, README(hero), LICENSE(MIT), examples/3 (engine-rendered), tests/15, cli_triplet domains/run/report
honest_boundary: domain packs are ILLUSTRATIVE models, not production R&D tools (no real drug discovery / chip design) — stated in README. Local only (repo_url empty) until published.
next: USER-DECISION: (a) commit Confluence as tracked deliverable, (b) publish independent repo github.com/sadpig70/Confluence, (c) another full-cycle turn
